name: Chicken Panang
recipeIngredient: 225 grams chicken breast halves without skin, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Stir-fry the panang curry paste until fragrant.
2. Add the chicken slices and cook until browned on all sides.
3. Pour in the coconut milk, fish sauce, and sugar. Bring to a boil.
4. Add the peas and shredded chili peppers. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Garnish with additional chili flakes if desired and serve hot over steamed rice.
